GPAntiCheat_.DESCRIPTION: Responsible for detecting automatic drawing and substitution of drawings (passing off other players’ drawings as their own) using scripts

GPArtBroadcaster_.DESCRIPTION: Responsible for posting drawings on social networks (Discord, Telegram, VK) directly from the Gartic Phone album along with the drawing process

GPAvatars_.DESCRIPTION: Responsible for displaying custom gartic avatars for other players and set your own avatar using the editor
GPAvatars_.NATIVE_AVATARS_BTN_TTL: Open Gartic Phone default avatars panel
GPAvatars_.DRAG_FILE_HINT: Drag file here or select from device
GPAvatars_.REQUEST_SUBMITTED:
Request to restore the default avatar 
has been sent
GPAvatars_.REQUEST_FAILED_HINT:
Please check the availability of 
discord.com in your browser

GPBackgroundChanger_.FILE_DROP_AREA: Drag file here or select from device

GPGlobalBanlist_.DESCRIPTION: Responsible for lableing people who are on the Global Ban List and warn when malicious raids on Gartic Phone Streams are going on
GPGlobalBanlist_.RAID_WARNING:
Attention!

At this moment streams are being raided in order to show prohibited content. Be careful with new players.
GPGlobalBanlist_.SELF_RAID_WARNING:
Attention!

Your stream is being raided in order to publish prohibited content. This may result in the channel being banned. Be careful when playing with new players.

GPModeration_.DESCRIPTION: Responsible for moderation features such as hiding drawings,  preview panel, banning players, and a panel on the left with a list of every player's current status
GPModeration_.MODE_BTN_TTL: Switch between full and compact modes
GPModeration_.PREIVEW_PANEL_WARNING: This area should be hidden from the stream
GPModeration_.PREIVEW_TAB_WARNING: Preview is displayed in a separate tab

GPModulesManager_.ICON_MISMATCH: Account not linked to the key

GPPainter_.DESCRIPTION: Responsible for adding to the drawing editor: canvas scaling, symmetry tool, advanced and custom palettes, and many other features
GPPainter_.PALETTE_FILE_DROP_AREA_TTL: Drag palette file here or select from device

dropper:
Dropper tool
Picks a color from the canvas under the pointer
thickness:
Change brush thickness with pointer
Hold a key and move the pointer (default left / right)
opacity:
Change brush opacity with pointer
Hold a key and move the pointer (default left / right)
brightness:
Change color brightness with pointer
Hold a key and move the pointer (default up / down)
zoom:
Zoom in / out canvas with pointer
Hold a key and move the pointer (default up / down)
zoomToPoint:
Zoom canvas to point under pointer
Pressing the key again resets zoom
mirror:
Mirror tool
Flips the canvas horizontally. The effect is only visible while drawing and is disabled after the round ends.
verticalMirror:
Vertical mirror tool
Flips the canvas vertically. The effect is only visible while drawing and is disabled after the round ends.
colorPicker: Open Color Picker panel under pointer
switchColors: Switch between primary and secondary colors
eraser:
Eraser tool
Activates while holding a key and returns to the previous tool when released
grayscale:
Enable grayscale filter
The effect is only visible while drawing and is disabled after the round ends. Does not affect the final drawing.
hand:
Hand tool
Allows moving the canvas while holding a key
rotate: Rotate canvas while holding a key
symmetry:
Symmetrical drawing
Requires time to send all strokes to the server, as shown in the bottom right corner of the editor header, depending on the number of symmetry guides. Keep this in mind for games with limited drawing time.
reference:
Reference panel
Search and select images or their parts as references for your drawing
toolCentering:
Tool centering
Allows drawing shapes from the center while holding a key. When the "Centering Circle Tool" option is enabled, the effect for "Circle" and "Filled circle" tools is disabled instead.
perfectShapes: Create perfect circles and squares, or snap lines to vertical, horizontal, and diagonal axes
grid:
Enable grid
3 grid modes are toggled by pressing the key repeatedly
customThickness1:
Custom brush thickness
Can be set through the "Custom Thickness" option
customThickness2:
Custom brush thickness
Can be set through the "Custom Thickness" option
customThickness3:
Custom brush thickness
Can be set through the "Custom Thickness" option
customThickness4:
Custom brush thickness
Can be set through the "Custom Thickness" option
customThickness5:
Custom brush thickness
Can be set through the "Custom Thickness" option
thicknessPanelSlot1:
Select brush thickness in panel slot 1
Thickness 2
thicknessPanelSlot2:
Select brush thickness in panel slot 2
Thickness 6
thicknessPanelSlot3:
Select brush thickness in panel slot 3
Thickness 10
thicknessPanelSlot4:
Select brush thickness in panel slot 4
Thickness 14
thicknessPanelSlot5:
Select brush thickness in panel slot 5
Thickness 18
customOpacity1:
Custom brush opacity
Can be set through the "Custom Opacity" option
customOpacity2:
Custom brush opacity
Can be set through the "Custom Opacity" option
customOpacity3:
Custom brush opacity
Can be set through the "Custom Opacity" option
customOpacity4:
Custom brush opacity
Can be set through the "Custom Opacity" option
customOpacity5:
Custom brush opacity
Can be set through the "Custom Opacity" option

GPPlayersManager_.DESCRIPTION: Responsible for the Process Player for the drawings with functions for selecting speed / rewinding and saving the drawing in higher definition and its source file

GPReference_.DESCRIPTION: Responsible for adding a panel with a search bar and selection of drawing references, which can be turned on in the drawing editor header

GPSettingsManager_.LOAD_JSON_TTL: Load settings from clipboard in JSON format
GPSettingsManager_.RESTORE_BTN_TTL: Restore game settings to previous launch

GPTimer_.DESCRIPTION: Responsible for the Timer with sound alert and auto-ready after time expires (displayed in the drawing editor header and is used in long games)
